infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Fervora needs camera access to take photos and videos for your posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Fervora needs photo library access to attach photos and videos to your posts.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Fervora uses your location to find nearby users and show your city on your profile.

plugins.cameraPermission: Fervora needs camera access to take photos and videos for your posts.
plugins.photosPermission: Fervora needs photo library access to attach photos and videos to your posts.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Fervora reads your workouts from Apple Health so you can share them with your community.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Fervora uses your location to find nearby users and show your city on your profile.
